description_long: This is a roughly rectangular, medium-sized stone with a natural, uneven surface and a warm brown coloration. The stone displays irregular edges and corners, with some faces appearing smoother while others are more jagged and chipped. There are visible markings and handwritten text on one of the longer faces, suggesting it may have been cataloged or used for identification purposes. The surface texture is coarse, with small pits and variations in color, indicating a sedimentary or weathered origin. Some white patches and minor discolorations are present, possibly from contact with other materials or environmental exposure. The overall appearance suggests it could serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban setting, such as a boundary marker or landscape feature.
description: A medium-sized, brown, roughly rectangular stone with coarse, uneven surfaces and visible handwritten markings on one face.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest, flattest face of the stone, highlighting its brown color and natural, slightly pitted texture.
description_view_1: This angled view reveals the stone's thickness and one of its rougher, more irregular sides, with some edge chipping visible.
description_view_2: This perspective displays the top face with clear handwritten text and a more angular, blocky profile.
description_view_3: This view focuses on one of the shorter ends, showing a chipped corner and a small white patch, emphasizing the stone's irregularity.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a boundary marker
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and minor pitting, with visible handwritten text on one face; no regular veining or artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly chipped, with some discoloration and minor surface wear indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smoother, man-made surfaces but could blend with other natural stones or landscaping materials; may accumulate dirt or debris at the base.
